failures.description: The agent called ProductCatalogSearch with an invalid payload instead of supplying the required string product_id and item_id for item 1151293680 of the Mechanical Keyboard.
failures.checklist_reasoning: At the failing step, the agent attempted to use ProductCatalogSearch with arguments {"product_id": 0}. The tool explicitly returned a SchemaError saying catalog.get_details requires string product_id and item_id. This is a malformed tool invocation: product_id has the wrong type/value and item_id is missing. The error is not connectivity, access, or guardrail-related.
